args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, Hono
- Reads as: Type definitions (InitApp, CreateHandlersInterface), class implementation, factory function
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
- Safe summary: Provides createFactory and createMiddleware for app initialization with optional init callbacks.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context utility functions for routing inspection
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
- Safe summary: Returns matched route paths, individual route paths, base paths, and full path stacks from context.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContextInit, WSMessageReceive, defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext
- Reads as: Interface definitions, class WSContext, helper factory function
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with typed events and context for handling WebSocket connections.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: Cookie read/write utility functions with parse/serialize helpers
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Manages HTTP cookies including signed cookie support for secure storage and retrieval.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Client generator for client testing
- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../context, ../../types
- Safe summary: Creates test client from Hono app for testing API responses.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime type
- Reads as: Runtime detection helper using global/env variables
- Neighbor files: ../../context
- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light) via userAgent and global properties.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS context provider for class name generation and style rendering
- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html
- Safe summary: Provides CSS class name generation, keyframes, and style tag rendering with custom slug options.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID
- Reads as: Shared CSS utilities with hash-based class naming and style string building
- Neighbor files: (shared module, called by helper/css/index.ts)
- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities for building style strings, generating class names from hashes, and minifying CSS.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN, ProxyFetch, buildRequestInitFromRequest
- Reads as: HTTP proxy fetch function with header management
- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxies requests to another URL, managing hop-by-hop headers and allowed token patterns.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData, handlerName
- Reads as: Development helper for displaying route information
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
- Safe summary: Inspects and displays router routes with colorized output for development debugging.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw, HtmlEscapedString, escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString
- Reads as: HTML string builder with escaping utilities
- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
- Safe summary: Generates HTML strings with automatic escaping and callback-based rendering.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ToSSGOptions, SSGContext, AddedSSGDataRequest, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
- Reads as: Re-export index file for Static Site Generation helpers
- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./plugins
- Safe summary: Index file exporting SSG main functionality, plugins, and middleware for static generation.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultExtensionMap, SSGPlugin, ToSSGInterface, createPool, parseResponseContent, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks
- Reads as: Main SSG implementation with content fetching, file saving, and hook composition
- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins
- Safe summary: Core Static Site Generator implementation with parallel fetching, file saving, and extensible hooks.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir, dirname
- Reads as: Path manipulation and route filtering utilities for SSG
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler, ./middleware
- Safe summary: Utility functions for path joining, dynamic route detection, and static route filtering for SSG.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: Streaming API index re-export file
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
- Safe stream: Re-exports streaming helpers for SSE, text streaming, and generic streams.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, TransformStream, TransformableStream, contextStash, isOldBunVersion
- Reads as: Generic streaming API implementation with TransformStream
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: Creates readable/writable streams with context attachment for streaming responses.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi class
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events implementation with message formatting
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSE streaming with message support for event id, retry, and custom event types.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText, TEXT_PLAIN, StreamTextOptions
- Reads as: Text streaming utility wrapping the stream helper
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./
- Safe summary: Streams text content with content-type header as text/plain for streaming responses.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Re-export index file
- Neighbor files: ./accepts
- Safe summary: Index file re-exporting the accepts header parsing helper.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, acceptsOptions, acceptsConfig, Accept type, Accept interface
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching utility
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: Parses Accept headers and matches supported content types or languages.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Re-export index file for connection info types
- Neighbor files: ./types
- Safe summary: Index file re-exporting connection information types.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Type definitions for connection information
- Neighbor files: ../../context
- Safe summary: Type definitions for network connection info including IPv6/IPv4 address data.
